CONTENT.Club career: On 22 January 2021, Mbamba made his debut for Brugge's reserve side, Club NXT in the Belgian First Division B against Lierse.He made his league debut for the senior squad of Brugge in the Belgian First Division A on 23 May 2021, when he started in the game against Genk, at the age of 16.He made his Champions league debut on 3 November 2021 against Manchester City at the age of 16.On 14 January 2023, Mbamba joined German club Bayer Leverkusen for an undisclosed fee, signing a contract until June 2028.On 19 June 2024, Mbamba joined Fortuna Düsseldorf on loan for the 2024–25 season.
CONTENT.External links: Noah Mbamba at WorldFootball.netProfile at the Club Brugge website
CONTENT.International career: Born in Belgium, Mbamba is of Congolese descent. He is a youth international for Belgium.

SUMMARY: Noah Mbamba-Muanda (born 5 January 2005) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder or centre-back for German 2. Bundesliga club Fortuna Düsseldorf on loan from Bayer Leverkusen.
